title: Vanilla tweaks apple skin cake hunger bar
description: Addon for Cake hunger bar from vanilla tweaks website, which adds compatibility with Apple skin for older versions of vanilla tweaks resource pack.
body:
<details>
<summary>EN</summary>

Addon for Cake hunger bar from vanilla tweaks website, which adds compatibility with AppleSkin mod

</details>



<details>
<summary>RU</summary>

Дополнение для Cake Hunger Bar с сайта vanilla tweaks, которое добавляет совместимость с модом AppleSkin

</details>
